description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a gable roof and a mix of traditional and modern design elements. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some green climbing plants adding a touch of nature to the facade. The front features a paved driveway with a metal pergola carport, and a small fenced yard with brick paving. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some featuring decorative shutters and a large sunroom or enclosed porch at the rear. The property includes a side yard with trees and a white picket fence, and a prominent brick chimney is visible on one side. The overall appearance is clean, inviting, and suburban, suitable for a family residence.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof, carport, sunroom, and fenced yard, blending traditional and modern elements. Features include symmetrical windows, a brick chimney, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, metal pergola carport, and climbing plants on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the expanse of the gable roof, with a glimpse of the backyard and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large sunroom or enclosed porch, white picket fence, and backyard landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick chimney, sunroom, and the carport from the rear, with fencing enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with decorative shutters and a large sunroom section
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small overhang, paved steps, and climbing plants; no porch or columns, but a metal pergola carport adjacent.
